title: 实习生，月入12万
content: AI talent competition has intensified dramatically, with DeepSeek offering top interns 5,500 yuan daily (over 120,000 yuan monthly) to attract elite candidates from programs like Tsinghua's Yao Class. Major tech firms including Tencent, ByteDance, and Huawei are aggressively recruiting younger candidates earlier—some targeting high schoolers—with compensation packages reaching millions annually. The trend reflects a fundamental shift: companies now view young, adaptable AI researchers as decisive competitive assets capable of transforming industry direction, with traditional hiring timelines accelerated and compensation structures increasingly resembling Silicon Valley's war for talent.

title: 900 万副 AI 眼镜连夜「上锁」，就因为一颗小白灯
content: Meta is updating 9 million AI glasses to permanently disable cameras if the privacy LED is tampered with, following concerns about covert recording. The white indicator light signals when recording occurs, but underground services have offered to drill out LEDs. New York courts and other venues have banned camera-equipped glasses entirely. The issue highlights broader tensions: as cameras become smaller and more ambient in AI devices, maintaining public trust requires clear boundaries, rules on data use, and putting protection burden on manufacturers rather than unsuspecting bystanders.

title: 这，可能是今年WAIC最惊艳的图片！
content: SenseNova U1 Pro, a new Chinese image generation model from SenseTime launched at WAIC 2026, produces native 8K images and functions as an autonomous design system. Unlike standard models requiring extensive human refinement, U1 Pro independently drafts, refines, color-corrects, verifies, and delivers finished work. It handles complex multi-step projects like 24-solar-term scrolls, scientific posters, and commercial film posters with detailed text and coherent composition. The model uses 32×32 patches to manage computational demands of high resolution while preserving fine details through adaptive noise control and overlap techniques. SenseTime positions this as shifting image generation from single outputs to system-level content delivery, analogous to AI coding's evolution from completion to autonomous agents.

Supply chain specialization replaced vertical integration, with domestic core component availability exceeding 75%, signaling humanoid robots' transition from laboratory curiosities to scalable commercial products.

title: 优衣库最值得买的系列，可能要没了
content: Uniqlo U series, the decade-long designer collaboration with Christophe Lemaire and Sarah-Linh Tran, may end in 2026. Unlike typical short-term fashion collaborations, U series succeeded by embedding Lemaire's design philosophy into Uniqlo's permanent organization through a Paris R&D center, creating a distinctive aesthetic that reshaped the brand's identity. Chinese brands like Bosideng and Peacebird tried similar designer partnerships for premium positioning but mostly achieved temporary marketing buzz. The key lesson: designer collaborations become true brand assets only when design capabilities are institutionalized internally, not merely borrowed for seasonal hype.

title: WAIC五位首席科学家交锋：多模态是LLM的“外挂”，还是下一代智能的“灵魂”？
content: At a WAIC 2026 forum, five chief scientists debated whether multimodal AI is merely an extension of large language models or the foundation of next-generation intelligence. Key分歧 emerged: Qiu Xipeng argued language remains central with multimodal alignment; Zhao Deli contended multimodal models represent a new paradigm for physical-world intelligence; Zhang Xiangyu focused on learning paradigms and autonomous learning capabilities; Liu Ziwei used Plato's cave allegory to argue AI must move beyond language's "shadows." Consensus formed that current bottlenecks span data scarcity, non-native multimodal architectures, and inadequate memory mechanisms. Looking five years ahead, participants warned against overestimating agent autonomy while underestimating AI's societal transformation.

title: 把 app 的每一个页面 copy 给 AI， ai 能复刻出这个 app 吗？它能自动发掘其后的逻辑，复刻出来吗？
content: Copying every page of an app to AI does not enable full replication. Screenshots alone lack underlying logic, data flows, APIs, and backend architecture. While AI can infer visual layouts and some interactive elements, it cannot automatically discover hidden business rules, authentication systems, database structures, or third-party integrations. Complete replication would still require substantial manual engineering to reconstruct functional logic and infrastructure.

title: 为什么事实说服不了人？真正改变别人想法的4个关键方法
content: People resist changing their minds not because they misunderstand facts, but because changing views threatens their identity and social belonging. The brain prioritizes group survival over truth, making arguments feel like personal attacks. Effective persuasion requires safety, time, and trust—not more evidence. Four practical methods: prioritize relationship over winning, avoid public confrontation, guide gradual change incrementally, and promote correct ideas rather than attacking wrong ones. True persuasion creates an environment where others willingly reconsider, rather than forcing victory through debate.
